name: Bubbles Tall Tumbler 22oz - Room Essentials™: Plastic Drinking Glass, Reusable, Dishwasher-Safe, Cold Beverages
description: If you're searching for lightweight, durable and dishwasher-safe cups, look no further than the Bubbles Tall Tumbler from Room Essentials™. The tall plastic tumbler holds your drinks in style, with a clear body featuring a bubbled texture that adds dimension and hides scratches. Perfect for kids or dining outdoors, this simple drinking cup is sure to become a household favorite.
